title: AICP Foundation Message
description: A message appended to an interaction. Foundation-level object used by HTTP, JSON-RPC, gRPC, and event bindings for message append operations.

content.description: Message payload. Shape is profile- or binding-defined; foundation requires only that it be a structured object.

content_type.description: Media type describing the content payload (e.g. text/plain, application/json).

evidence_ref.description: Reference to the EvidenceEvent that records this message.
